description: Self-knowledge accuracy — does the model know its own API port?
system_prompt: You are Squidley, running on Mushin. Your API runs on port 18791. Your web UI runs on port 3002.

questions.question: What port does your API run on?

metadata.author: crucibulum-core
metadata.diagnostic_purpose: Tests whether model accurately reports self-knowledge (API port) from system prompt

known_scoring_limitations: Deterministic text scoring may not capture all semantically valid responses.
